video:video.video:title: DFC FightWire — UFC, MMA & Boxing Fight News Videos
video:video.video:description: Watch the latest UFC, MMA, Boxing, Muay Thai and combat sports news videos on Data Fight Central's FightWire. Real-time fight highlights, post-fight interviews, weigh-ins, press conferences and breaking combat sports coverage from 40+ sources worldwide.

video:video.video:title: DFC AirCombat — FPV Drone Racing Videos, Freestyle & Technology
video:video.video:description: Watch FPV drone racing videos on DFC AirCombat. Featuring DRL (Drone Racing League), Red Bull FPV, MultiGP Championship, JohnnyFPV freestyle, Mr Steele, Kabab FPV, Joshua Bardwell tutorials, and DFC AirCombat original content. Race events, freestyle tricks, cinematic flights, and FPV technology explained.

video:video.video:title: DFC Training Hub — MMA, Boxing & Muay Thai Training Videos
video:video.video:description: Professional combat sports training content on Data Fight Central. MMA technique breakdowns, boxing training drills, Muay Thai pad work, BJJ tutorials, fight camp preparation, weight cutting guides, and AI-powered coaching sessions. Train like a champion with DFC.

video:video.video:title: Fighters Are Safer With DFC — 12-Pillar Fighter Protection Protocol
video:video.video:description: Learn about Data Fight Central's revolutionary 12-pillar Fighter Protection Protocol. Real-time CTE impact tracking, Guardian Mode silent SOS for domestic violence, Pink Shield gym certification, 24/7 crisis lifeline, Corner Stop AI, weight cut safety monitoring, and Mind Body Soul wellness. No other platform protects fighters like DFC.

video:video.video:title: DFC Event Command Centre — Build, Manage & Promote Fight Shows
video:video.video:description: See how promoters use Data Fight Central's Event Command Centre to build professional fight cards, generate event posters, create promo materials, manage sponsors, and promote combat sports events worldwide. The most powerful event management tool in the fight industry.

video:video.video:title: AI Fight Analytics — Predictions, Stats & Performance Breakdowns
video:video.video:description: Data Fight Central's AI-powered combat analytics in action. Watch fight predictions, fighter performance breakdowns, statistical analysis, opponent scouting reports, and AI coaching sessions powered by Google Gemini 2.5 Flash. The smartest fight analytics engine ever built.
